title: Pan-Seared Haddock with Ukrainian Pierogi and Caramelized Onions
description: A hearty and flavorful dish featuring pan-seared haddock, Ukrainian pierogi, and caramelized onions.
instructions: Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced onions and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Add haddock fillets to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, cook pierogi according to package instructions.
Serve haddock with pierogi and caramelized onions.
Garnish with sashimi for added flavor and texture.
